name: 倒敘衝擊開場
description: 以法庭宣判直接開場，觀眾第一秒就看到女主被判刑，立刻產生疑問：為什麼？她做了什麼？隨後揭露是替人頂罪，瞬間建立同情心和憤怒感，鉤住觀眾。

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: Defendant Fu Yaining. Involuntary manslaughter charge sustained. Sentenced to fixedterm imprisonment. Three years.

examples.drama_title: Reborn, my sister forced groom swap, so I married wild officer, tamed him, was spoiled like princess
examples.excerpt: 沈令儀，行政院秘書長夫人……慈善，仁心昭彰……我老公是個敗家子，整天跟舞女廝混，還把我趕出去了。這個賤人倒是活得風生水起，憑什麼？……去死吧，你們都去死吧！
